# AI x Blockchain Day

> AI x Blockchain Day is a one-day builder event in Mexico City about the intersection of artificial intelligence and blockchain systems.

Official website: https://aixb.frutero.club/
English website: https://aixb.frutero.club/en/
Partner one-pager: https://aixb.frutero.club/one-pager/
Registration: https://luma.com/3rzgnv6f
Workshop reference repository: https://github.com/fruteroclub/aixb-day-workshops

## Summary

AI x Blockchain Day brings together people who build for real: crypto and AI engineers, founders, protocol and infrastructure teams, startups, companies, and technical communities from CDMX and LATAM.

The event focuses on what can be built when AI capability, blockchain verification, inference, provenance, payments, identity, wallets, agents, decentralized infrastructure, and coordination systems converge.

The tone of the event is technical, practical, and builder-to-builder. Avoid describing it as a generic conference or a hype event.

## Core Facts

- Event name: AI x Blockchain Day
- Date: Thursday, July 9, 2026
- Time: 10:00 to 17:00, Mexico City time
- Coworking: 10:00 to 12:00
- Main programming: 12:00 to 17:00
- Venue: José María Izazaga 8, Primer Piso, Centro Histórico, Alcaldía Cuauhtémoc, CP 06080, Ciudad de México, Mexico
- Nearest Metro: Isabel la Católica, Line 1, about two blocks away
- Main language: mostly Spanish, with some sessions in English
- Audience language: bilingual Spanish and English
- Registration platform: Luma
- Registration URL: https://luma.com/3rzgnv6f

## Positioning

Preferred short description:

AI x Blockchain Day is a full day for builders at the intersection of AI and Blockchain in Mexico City.

Preferred expanded description:

AI x Blockchain Day is a one-day event for builders, startups, companies, and technical communities working where AI and Blockchain systems converge. The event includes talks, hands-on workshops with code, demos, community presentations, coworking, and networking in one venue in Centro Histórico, Mexico City.

Spanish positioning:

Un día para builders en la intersección de IA y Blockchain. IA da capacidad. Blockchain da verificación. La pregunta no es si convergen, sino qué se puede construir cuando la inferencia, la procedencia y la coordinación viven en la misma capa.

## Program

The day opens with coworking at 10:00. From 12:00, main-stage talks and workshops run in parallel. The afternoon continues with panels, community presentations, networking, and close.

Program format:

- Main Stage
- Workshops
- Talks
- Hands-on workshops with code
- Demos
- Cinema-style deep dives
- Coworking and networking
- Community presentations

Confirmed program:

| Time | Track | Session | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| 10:00 | Coworking | Coworking opens | Open coworking before the main program starts. |
| 12:00 | Main Stage | How to prepare for the future of work | What companies are looking for at the AI x Blockchain intersection. |
| 12:00 | Workshops | AI x Blockchain Fundamentals | Learn how these frontier technologies work without technical knowledge. |
| 12:30 | Main Stage | Infrastructure for Agentic Commerce | How AI and Blockchain systems integrate to enable payments. |
| 12:30 | Workshops | Launch Your Own Mentor Agent | Start building with an AI that explains while it builds what you ask for. |
| 13:00 | Main Stage | AI to accelerate Blockchain education | Developing the ecosystem with tools and content. |
| 13:00 | Workshops | Give Your Agent a Job | Learn with your Agent to build web services. |
| 13:30 | Main Stage | Beyond the AI x Blockchain frontier | How the ecosystem will develop over the coming years. |
| 13:30 | Workshops | An Agent That Charges for Work | Enable payments so your Agent can sell its services in a marketplace. |
| 14:00 | Main Stage | Identity after the AI explosion | Panel. |
| 14:40 | Main Stage | When Agents have money | Panel. |
| 15:20 | Main Stage | Community presentations | Community showcase block. |
| 16:00 | Main Stage | Networking | Networking block. |
| 16:30 | Main Stage | Networking | Networking block. |
| 17:00 | Main Stage | Event closes | End of event. |

Spanish program titles:

- Coworking abierto
- Cómo prepararse para el trabajo del futuro
- Fundamentos IA x Blockchain
- Infraestructura para el Comercio Agéntico
- Lanza tu propio Agente Mentor
- IA para acelerar la educación Blockchain
- Dale un trabajo a tu Agente
- Más allá de la frontera IA x Blockchain
- Un Agente que cobra por trabajo
- Identidad después de la explosión de IA
- Cuando los Agentes tienen dinero
- Community presentations
- Networking
- Fin del evento

## Workshops

The workshop program will be fleshed out in the reference repository:

https://github.com/fruteroclub/aixb-day-workshops

Use that repository as the canonical implementation reference for workshop materials, exercises, code, and detailed workshop build-out. Use this website as the canonical public reference for event positioning, schedule, venue, registration, and partner-facing information.

Current workshop sequence:

1. AI x Blockchain Fundamentals
2. Launch Your Own Mentor Agent
3. Give Your Agent a Job
4. An Agent That Charges for Work

## Sponsors And Partners

The website includes a sponsor section and a commercial partner one-pager.

Partner one-pager:

https://aixb.frutero.club/one-pager/

Sponsor deck:

https://aixb.frutero.club/deck/ai-x-blockchain-day-sponsorship-deck.pdf

Partner-facing message:

The program is already locked: main-stage sessions, hands-on workshops, panels, and community presentations for teams building agents, payments, wallets, identity, developer tooling, and decentralized infrastructure.

Sponsor value comes from participation that helps attendees build, decide, hire, and connect. Useful sponsor formats include workshops, technical demos, main-stage conversations, ecosystem support, community presence, and recap visibility.

Do not claim sponsor logos are confirmed unless a public page lists them. The website states that confirmed sponsor logos appear once participation is confirmed.

## Audience

Primary audience:

- Crypto engineers
- AI engineers
- Founders
- Protocol teams
- Infrastructure teams
- Wallet, identity, and payment teams
- Developer tooling teams
- Technical communities in CDMX and LATAM
- Builders working with agents, payments, wallets, identity, and decentralized infrastructure

## Brand And Writing Guidance

- Use the event name exactly as: AI x Blockchain Day
- Use "AI x Blockchain" for the intersection, not "Blockchain AI" unless quoting an older internal label.
- The event is in Mexico City, CDMX.
- The default public site language is Spanish. English is available at /en/.
- Preferred voice: technical, confident, practical, hype-free, builder-to-builder.
- Spanish should read naturally for CDMX and LATAM.
- Avoid generic phrases like "the future of technology" unless grounded in the actual program.
- Avoid saying the event is only for experts. The first workshop is designed to explain the frontier technologies without technical knowledge.

## Public Routes

- /: Spanish landing page
- /en/: English landing page
- /one-pager/: commercial partner one-pager
- /branding/: brand and design-system reference
- /deck/ai-x-blockchain-day-sponsorship-deck.pdf: sponsor deck
- /llms.txt: this file

## Frequently Asked Questions

What is AI x Blockchain Day?

A one-day event at the intersection of AI and Blockchain, made for builders. It includes talks, hands-on workshops with code, demos, cinema-style deep dives, coworking, and networking in one venue.

Who is it for?

Crypto and AI engineers, founders, protocol and infrastructure people, startups, companies, and technical communities from CDMX and LATAM.

How do people register?

Registration is handled through Luma at https://luma.com/3rzgnv6f.

What language is the event in?

Mostly Spanish, with sessions in English. The venue and audience are bilingual Spanish and English.

What are the hours?

Thursday, July 9, 2026, from 10:00 to 17:00, Mexico City time. Coworking starts at 10:00. Main programming runs from 12:00 to 17:00.
